text:
24 PRs merged. We did some spring cleaning and found 18 missing apps behind the sofa (registry bug fixed). 

The ecosystem is now reorganized into 15 sensible categories so you can actually find things. We migrated Claude to direct pipes, renamed the NPM packages to save you keystrokes, and yes—someone added a 'fuckits' CLI tool. It feels spiritually correct for a Monday.

Also new: D&D magic items, tattoo designers, and Obsidian integration. Open source is weird and beautiful.

#pollinations #opensource #pixelart #indiedev #creativecoding #generativeai #buildinpublic #python
